name: New Orleans Chicory Pot Du Creame
recipeIngredient: Whipped cream in a pastry bag with star tip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Scrape inside of vanilla bean halves into cream and add the bean halves, sugar, and coffee in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Bring the cream up to a boil and reduce to a simmer. Simmer the cream for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat and discard the vanilla bean.
5. In an electric mixer, beat the egg yolks.
6. Gradually pour the hot cream into the mixer and mix well until incorporated.
7. Strain the liquid into a pitcher.
8. Place 8 (3/4 cup) cups in a roasting pan. Fill the cups to the rim. Fill the pan with water.
9. Cover the pan loosely with foil and bake for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until set. Remove from the pan and let custards cool completely.
10. Place in refrigerator and chill for 1 hour before serving.
11. Garnish with whipped cream, chocolate shavings, and espresso powder.
